messages.content: rephrase Further to our below email, please also find below our comments on what was happening on Jake’s 2021/22 HK individual tax filings.
Following our previous email, we are providing additional information regarding Jake's 2021/22 HK individual tax filings. Please find below our comments on the matter.
rephrase again
In addition to our previous communication, we would like to share our feedback on Jake's individual tax filings for the 2021/22 period in Hong Kong. Please see below for our comments.
rephrase Further to our below email, please also find below our explanation on what was happening on Jake’s 2021/22 HK individual tax filings.
Following up on our previous email, we would like to provide an explanation regarding Jake's 2021/22 Hong Kong individual tax filings. Please see below for our detailed clarification.
rephrase again

As a continuation of our previous email, we would like to offer an explanation regarding the 2021/22 individual tax filings of Jake in Hong Kong. Kindly refer below for our comprehensive clarification.
Is it common for employee discounts to be reviewed if a company is under audit?

It is possible for employee discounts to be reviewed during an audit of a company, but whether or not it is common can vary based on the specific circumstances of the audit. If the audit focuses on areas related to employee compensation or benefits, it may be more likely that employee discounts would be scrutinized. However, audits can differ in scope and focus, and there is no one-size-fits-all answer to whether employee discounts are commonly reviewed during audits.
shorter answer please

It depends on the specific audit and focus of the investigation. Although employee discounts may be reviewed during an audit, whether or not it is common varies based on the circumstances of the audit.
too short
It is possible, but varies depending on the focus of the audit.
longer answer please

During an audit, it is possible for employee discounts to be reviewed if such discounts are considered an employee benefit or a form of compensation. However, whether or not employee discounts are commonly reviewed during an audit can depend on the specific focus of the investigation. If the audit primarily centers on issues related to employee compensation or benefits, it is more likely that employee discounts would also be examined. Nonetheless, audits vary in their scope and objectives, and there is no one-size-fits-all answer to whether employee discounts are commonly reviewed during audits.
a bit shorter please
Employee discounts may come under review during an audit if they are deemed as an employee benefit or compensation. Whether or not this is common depends on the focus of the investigation.
Is it common for employee discounts to be reviewed if a company is under audit?

The frequency of review of employee discounts during an audit can vary depending on the focus of the audit, so it is difficult to provide a definitive answer. However, discounts could potentially come under scrutiny if they are considered a form of employee compensation or benefit.

In case that the discount benefit becomes taxable, Uber (as the employer) will need to report the taxable benefit as allowances in the employee's Employer's Returns (Form IR56B/F/G) for the relevant assessment year. rephrse

If the discount benefit is deemed to be taxable, Uber, as the employer, will be required to report this as an allowance in the employee's Employer's Returns (Form IR56B/F/G) during the corresponding assessment year.
Is it common for employee discounts to be reviewed if a company is under audit? If so, what is the potential exposure in case of employer non-compliance?

It is possible for an audit to include review of employee discounts, although the frequency may depend on what the audit is focused on. If an employer is found to be non-compliant regarding taxable employee discounts, they may face penalties and/or interest charges on overdue tax amounts. The potential exposure depends on the severity of the non-compliance, and legal advice should be sought in such cases.
